textPlain: The model weighs 1.5GB [1]The demo is impressive. It uses reference audio at inference time, and it looks like the training code is mostly available [2][3] with a reference dataset [4] as well.From the README:> NeuTTS Air is built off Qwen 0.5B1. https://huggingface.co/neuphonic/neutts-air/tree/main2. https://github.com/neuphonic/neutts-air/issues/73. https://github.com/neuphonic/neutts-air/blob/feat/example-fi...4. https://huggingface.co/datasets/neuphonic/emilia-yodas-engli...
If this lives up to the demo it's a huge development for anyone looking to do realistic tts without paying to use an API
